author: etsefzale
description: A simple AI assistant to help with your notes using the Google Gemini API. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Inspired by "ai-commander" by Simon Yang • A simple AI assistant to help with your notes via the Google Gemini API. (This is my first plugin, be nice plz '^^) • Forks & inspirations allowed WITH CREDIT.
manifest.name: Gemini AI Commander

name: Gemini AI Commander

releases.author: EtsefZale
releases.description:
## New Feature: MODEL REFRESH!
- Don't see a model you were looking for? Click refresh, and the model list will update with the latest Gemini models!

---

### **_NEW INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS!!!_** Check the [repository home page](https://github.com/EtsefZale/obsidian_gemini-ai-commander#-getting-started) for more info!

releases.author: EtsefZale
releases.description:
## More New Features!
Gemini AI Commander now types out the final text Gemini is processing in real time, allowing you to instantly see what exactly Gemini is working on without needing to wait for the full response!
You now also have an option to stop processing the request! Simply click the Gemini AI Commander Sidebar Ribbon and click "Cancel Processing", or run the command in the Command Palette via `(Ctrl/Cmd) + P`!

I also created `versions.json` to prepare for submission to the official Obsidian.md Community Plugin store, so here's to hoping that goes well! ^^

---

Same installation instructions as last time; check the [repository home page](https://github.com/EtsefZale/obsidian_gemini-ai-commander) for more info!

**Most Recent Changelog**: https://github.com/EtsefZale/obsidian_gemini-ai-commander/compare/v1.1.0...v1.2.0

releases.author: EtsefZale
releases.description:
# Minor Update

We have Excalidraw support now!
If you have a `.excalidraw` or `.excalidraw.md` file linked, Gemini AI Commander will quickly export it as an image so Gemini can read it, send it to the Gemini API, and quickly discard it so it doesn’t take up space!

---

Same installation instructions as last time; check the [repository home page](https://github.com/EtsefZale/obsidian_gemini-ai-commander) for more info!

releases.author: EtsefZale
releases.description:
### MY FIRST PLUGIN BABYYYYYYYYYYYYYYY

Hope y'all enjoy it! ^^

---

### Installation & 1st-Time Setup
1. Install the **BRAT** plugin from the official Obsidian Community Plugins directory and enable it.
2. Open the command palette (`Cmd/Ctrl + P`) and run the command **BRAT: Add a beta plugin for testing**.
3. Paste the URL of this GitHub repository: `https://github.com/EtsefZale/obsidian_gemini-ai-commander`
4. Click **Add Plugin**.
5. Go to **Settings > Community Plugins**, find **Gemini AI Commander**, and turn it on.
6. Go to [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/) and sign in with your Google account.
7. Click **Get API Key** and generate a new key (no credit card required).
8. Open Obsidian, go to **Settings > Gemini AI Commander**, and paste your key.
